description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet. Product Details Textured brown wallet with embossed branding on the front with two main compartments A flap on the right fold with three card holder slots and a photo id slot Three card slots, one slip pocket on the left fold, a zippered pocket on the spine, a slip pocket on the right and coin pocket Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight Size Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
